---
title: "A Federated Knowledge Graph Architecture for Dutch Cadastral Data"
subtitle: "Conference Paper"
toc: false
---

[← Back to Works](../works.qmd)

::: {.work-card-meta}
Kadaster · University of Twente
:::

---

Proposes a federated virtual knowledge graph architecture that enables interoperable querying over Dutch cadastral data sources without centralizing the underlying datasets. The architecture leverages ontology-based data access (OBDA) principles and SPARQL federation to connect heterogeneous land registration systems in a privacy-respecting manner.

---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Use your browser's built-in controls to zoom, scroll, or download the PDF.
:::

<iframe
  class="pdf-viewer"
  src="../papers/A%20Federated%20Knowledge%20Graph%20Architecture%20for%20Dutch%20Cadastral%20Data.pdf"
  title="A Federated Knowledge Graph Architecture for Dutch Cadastral Data">
  <p>Your browser does not support embedded PDFs.
  <a href="../papers/A%20Federated%20Knowledge%20Graph%20Architecture%20for%20Dutch%20Cadastral%20Data.pdf">Download the PDF</a> to view it.</p>
</iframe>
